positive: Minimalist celestial forest composition, featuring stylized, interlocking geometric flora and fauna (e.g., moth wings, stylized antlers, bioluminescent mushrooms). The scene must evoke a dreamy, ethereal forest at twilight, utilizing a restricted palette of deep indigo, cosmic purple, luminous teal, and brilliant gold accents. Style: Clean vector illustration combined with subtle linework detailing. Composition: Central, symmetrical focus perfect for apparel transfer. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic glow emanating from the magical elements. Depth: Flat, graphic design feel with strong silhouettes and distinct separation between foreground and background elements. Print-friendly, highly scalable, isolated subject focus.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor anatomy, bad hands, extra limbs, messy, clutter, jpeg artifacts, realistic photo, photographic, gradient mesh
